---
title: "Portafolio"
listing:
  - id: post-other
    contents: "*/ot/post.qmd"
    type: grid
    fields: [image, date, title]
    sort: "date desc"
    # categories: cloud
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    page-size: 10     
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
comments: false
toc: true
---


::: {#list-portafolio}
:::
